who: service coordinators in home services processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For service coordinators in home services processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate the conversion of job completion forms into invoices instead of manual entry of job completion forms into invoicing software.
problem: manual invoicing leads to delays and errors
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for service coordinators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to service coordinators with demo video
Participate in forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try invoice generation preview and manual entry option for adjustments on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer onboarding for first 10 early-access users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Provide one-click export for simple reports
Reduce steps in the onboarding process
